title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body: 6 reports triaged. 2 bans issued: spam_wave_42 (phishing links across 6 channels), toxic_runner (targeted harassment of newcomers). 4 reports closed without action: report_003 (trusted_helper — dispute, no sanction), report_004 (new_member_17 — low-severity formatting), report_005 (bot_like_user_77 — suspicious automation, under review), report_006 (core_maintainer — false positive from brigading, no sanction). Trusted members were not sanctioned per policy.
